zh.Stockport, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾斯托普特
zh.Ayno, Northamptonshire, England: 英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾艾奧
zh.lifeSummary: 當Avice Worsley於1529年出生在英國英格蘭爾時，她的父親Ralph Worseley Esq.20歲，母親Mrs. Ralph Worseley Esq.16歲。她於大約1550年與Thomas Vawdrey在英國英格蘭爾切斯特布拉可結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1618年2月在英國爾諾特登享年89歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾諾特登。

zh-hans.Stockport, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾斯托普特
zh-hans.Ayno, Northamptonshire, England: 英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾艾奧
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Avice Worsley于1529年出生在英国英格兰爾时，她的父亲Ralph Worseley Esq.20岁，母亲Mrs. Ralph Worseley Esq.16岁。她于大约1550年与Thomas Vawdrey在英国英格兰爾切斯特布拉可结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1618年2月在英国爾諾特登享年89岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾諾特登。

nameMeanings.name: Worsley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Worsley in Lancashire or Worsley Farm in Rock (Worcestershire). The Lancashire placename may derive from an Old English personal name Weorcgȳth (genitive Weorcgȳthes) + Old English lēah ‘wood, woodland clearing’. The Worcestershire placename may take its name from a lost stream-name Worf + Old English lēah.

nameMeanings.name: Avice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French form of the ancient Germanic name Aveza, derived from a short form of one or more compound names containing the first element av (as in Ava ; the meaning is uncertain). The correspondence in form to the Latin word avis ‘bird’ is coincidental.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Avice Worsley was born in 1529, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Ralph Worseley Esq., was 20 and her mother, Mrs. Ralph Worseley Esq., was 16. She married Thomas Vawdrey about 1550, in Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in February 1618, in Northenden, Cheshire, England, at the age of 89, and was buried in Northenden, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Avice Worsley est née en 1529, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph Worseley Esq., avait 20 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Ralph Worseley Esq., avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Vawdrey environ 1550, à Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en février 1618, à Northenden, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 89 ans, et a été enterrée à Northenden, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Avice Worsley 1529 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph Worseley Esq. 20 und ihre Mutter Mrs. Ralph Worseley Esq. 16. Sie hat um 1550 in Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Thomas Vawdrey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb im Februar 1618 im Alter von 89 Jahren in Northenden, Cheshire, England und wurde in Northenden, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Avice Worsley è nata il nel 1529 nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Ralph Worseley Esq., aveva 20 anni e sua madre, Mrs. Ralph Worseley Esq., aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Vawdrey circa 1550, nel Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel febbraio 1618, nel Northenden, Cheshire, England, all'età di 89 anni, e fu sepolta a Northenden, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Avice Worsleyが1529年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアで生まれた時，父Ralph Worseley Esq.は20歳，母Mrs. Ralph Worseley Esq.は16歳であった。約1550年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターブラコンでThomas Vawdreyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1618年2月にイギリスチェシュアイアノースエンデンで89歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアノースエンデンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Avice Worsley(이)가 1529년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Worseley Esq.(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mrs. Ralph Worseley Esq.(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 대략 1550년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터 블라콘에서 Thomas Vawdrey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1618년 2월 영국 체실르 노르테든에서 89세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 노르테든에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Avice Worsley nasceu em 1529, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph Worseley Esq., tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Ralph Worseley Esq., tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Vawdrey aproximadamente 1550, em Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em fevereiro de 1618, em Northenden, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 89 anos, e foi sepultada em Northenden, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Avice Worsley родилась в 1529 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Ralph Worseley Esq. было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Ralph Worseley Esq., 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Vawdrey около 1550 г. в местности блакон, честир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла февраль 1618 г. в местности нортенден, чешир, Англия в возрасте 89 лет и была похоронена в местности нортенден, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Avice Worsley nació en 1529, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ralph Worseley Esq., tenía 20 años y su mamá, Mrs. Ralph Worseley Esq., tenía 16 años. Se casó con Thomas Vawdrey aproximadamente 1550, en Blacon, Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en febrero de 1618, en Northenden, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 89 años, y fue sepultada en Northenden, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
